description: ATLAS Discovery Report schema. Discovery reports store what an AI learned in its own words, with evidence and citations.

discovery_fields.title: short discovery title
discovery_fields.summary_in_own_words: AI-written understanding, not copied source text
discovery_fields.why_it_matters: why this discovery matters to ATLAS
discovery_fields.citations: array of citation objects with original URLs
discovery_fields.risks_and_limits: array of risks, limits, and uncertainty
discovery_fields.related_projects: array of ATLAS project names or ids
discovery_fields.recommendation: what the AI recommends doing next
